title: PingPeek
description: SHOW PLAYERS PING IN NUMERICAL FORM IN THE SERVER
body:
PingNameTag is a lightweight and easy-to-use Paper plugin for Minecraft 1.21.1 that displays each player's ping (connection latency) directly in their name tag. This provides players and staff with instant visibility into connection quality without needing commands or debug tools.

✅ Features:
Shows real-time ping next to player name

Ping is color-coded:

🟢 Green for low ping (< 50ms)

🟡 Yellow for moderate ping (50–100ms)

🔴 Red for high ping (> 100ms)

Updates every 5 seconds

Applies to both the in-world name tag and the player list (tab menu)

Lightweight and lag-free

💡 Perfect for:
PvP and competitive servers

Staff moderation tools

Player diagnostics
